704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594418604414602264","book_info":{"abstract":"【毁童年】【多女】【综漫】【日常】【全收】
穿越到《哆啦A梦》的世界，没有系统，没有金手指，我却直接掀翻了童年滤镜——
别人忙着拯救大雄，我却叩开了野比玉子的心门！
 
“天明，只要你心里有我就好……”
当温柔的母亲卸下所有伪装，我知道，这场综漫之旅，注定要颠覆所有人的认知。
 
没有系统加持，我凭魏武之姿，在各个动漫世界里横推剧情：
从野比玉子的温柔乡出发，踏平《火影》的忍界纷争，染指《海贼》的伟大航路，将那些遥不可及的动漫女神，一一纳入我的版图！
 
多女主？那是基本操作！
毁童年？这才是穿越的真谛！
当熟悉的角色纷纷拜倒，当禁忌的情感肆意滋生，我要让整个二次元，都记住我的名字——
这一次，我要做所有动漫世界的主宰！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/59018e623dbdf071e01d4338c7cf7491","author":"黄某誓与赌毒不共戴天","author_id":"","book_id":"7594418604414602264","book_name":"综漫无系统：我先拿下野比玉子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#581010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594418610248876568","read_count":"12200","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"254006"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"87","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,穿越,二次元,综漫,开局,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ea2b9b490b5490db37a02d9d971c77c8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365446&x-signature=ds4kzKnAc%2BcwInOOGJGimo9ocYo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},
